The '''Destroyer''' was the feared [[Battle droid/Legends|killer droid]] of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Kugg]] on the planet [[Dodz]].
Kugg used the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] as an enforcer to his heavy tax increases on the [[Merchant/Legends|merchants]] of the planet Dodz.

When the young resident of Dodz, [[Jost Ellon]] stood up for the people with the aid of [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] & [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and his outdated [[Ranger X-1]] war droid, the Destroyer was destroyed in a battle with the Ranger X-1.

The speech pattern of the Destroyer was basically a snarling growl and nothing more.

==Behind the scenes==
The Destroyer was created by [[David Manak|Dave Manak]] and [[John Romita Sr.]] & [[Carlos Garzón]].
